A thousand
leaves. One
will.

Peace, in the shape of danger.

A 3D roguelite action on floating sky islands. You are the Leafborn, a living humanoid of a thousand leaves, born of the Tree of Life. Flow, burst, reform. Fight the rusted machines draining the sky.

Genre3D Roguelite · action
PlatformWindows · Steam
